blocks.text: After Liverpool's fall, Arsenal and Bayern must finish the job
PSG dismantled Liverpool 2-0 at Anfield last night. Atlético scraped through on Sørloth heroics. Tonight Arsenal protect a 1-0 lead at the Emirates — Bayern defend 2-1 at the Allianz.
♟️ 14:30 — Candidates finale: Sindarov clinches the title, earns World Championship shot
⚽ Sun 15:00 — Everton vs Liverpool, Merseyside Derby at Goodison
⚽ Sun 17:30 — Manchester City vs Arsenal, Etihad — Arsenal 6pts clear, title race alive
